purpose: A premium, interactive website experience that turns the real shipping-carton product photo into a polished consumer-brand story.

recommendedPlacement.secondary: Product detail page directly below the main product image
recommendedPlacement.mobileBehavior: Use vertical story cards with swipe/scroll progression instead of horizontal parallax.

uploadInstructions: Rename the product-in-box photo to eveglo-product-in-box.jpg.
Rename the polished hero image to fresh-and-natural-rice-indulgence.png.
Rename the front close-up to eveglo-front.jpg.
Rename the back close-up to eveglo-back.jpg.
Rename the unfolded box photo to eveglo-flat-carton.jpg.
Place all files in /public/assets/eveglo/ for Vite/React or /assets/eveglo/ for static HTML.

signatureModules.name: Reality-to-Retail Reveal
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: Most food sites only show polished mockups. This begins with the real carton full of product, then reveals the premium studio product image.

copy.headline: From packed cartons to a polished pantry staple.
copy.subheadline: EveGlō Instant Shirataki Rice brings a clean, modern low-calorie rice alternative into a format that feels ready for today’s grocery shelf.

interaction.desktop: Mouse movement or drag handle controls a diagonal wipe from carton photo to premium hero still.
interaction.mobile: Auto-play a slow 2.5 second reveal once, then allow thumb drag.

signatureModules.name: Living Package Hotspots
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: The product box becomes navigation. Visitors click the actual claims and package details to learn more.

hotspots.label: 35 Calories
hotspots.panelBody: A light rice-style option for bowls, soups, stir-fries, risottos, and everyday meals.

hotspots.label: 7g Carbohydrate
hotspots.panelBody: Simple front-of-pack nutrition communication for quick shopper decisions.

hotspots.label: Bilingual package
hotspots.panelBody: The package is built for a Canadian retail environment with clear bilingual front-facing copy.

hotspots.label: Trust icons
hotspots.panelBody: Fast-recognition trust cues appear without overcrowding the front panel.

hotspots.label: Rice-style texture
hotspots.panelBody: The central window area gives shoppers an immediate sense of the product texture and use case.

signatureModules.name: Package Blueprint Mode
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: A hidden blueprint view makes the box feel engineered, not accidental, and shows retailer readiness.

copy.headline: Designed as a real retail carton, not just a mockup.
copy.body: Open the blueprint view to see the carton structure, barcode area, bilingual front panel, nutrition communication, and package layout logic.

panels.label: Front panel
panels.note: Main shopper-facing story: product name, rice visual, nutrition callouts, and dietary icons.

panels.label: Barcode area
panels.note: Retail-use placement that supports scanning and shelf operations.

panels.label: Side panel instructions
panels.note: Compact preparation and product information area for side-shelf review.

signatureModules.name: Ingredient Theater
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: Instead of a basic ingredient list, this creates a visual connection between konjac root, rice-style texture, and the finished product.

cards.title: Konjac root foundation
cards.body: A plant-based base that supports the shirataki rice identity.

cards.title: Rice-style texture
cards.body: A familiar grain-like experience for bowls, soups, stir-fries, and sauced dishes.

cards.title: Fast pantry use
cards.body: An instant format designed for quick meals without losing a clean product story.

signatureModules.name: Bilingual Glow Switch
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: The site can switch product callouts between English, French, and bilingual mode without changing the layout.

english.heroHeadline: Instant Shirataki Rice for lighter everyday meals.
english.heroSubcopy: A rice-style, plant-based pantry option with 35 calories and 7g carbohydrate per 50g serving.
english.shopperPrompt: Build a bowl. Stir into soup. Serve with your favourite sauce.

french.heroHeadline: Riz shirataki instantané pour des repas plus légers au quotidien.
french.heroSubcopy: Une option de garde-manger à texture de riz, avec 35 calories et 7 g de glucides par portion de 50 g.
french.shopperPrompt: Préparez un bol, ajoutez-le à une soupe ou servez-le avec votre sauce préférée.

bilingual.heroHeadline: Instant Shirataki Rice / Riz shirataki instantané
bilingual.heroSubcopy: A clean, rice-style pantry option designed for Canadian shelves and everyday meals.
bilingual.shopperPrompt: Taste The Glow of Nature / Goûtez l’éclat de la nature

signatureModules.name: Scan Story Card
signatureModules.whyItIsDifferent: The QR area on the back panel becomes a digital product bridge for recipes, preparation videos, retailer information, and product updates.

copy.headline: The package continues online.
copy.body: Use this section for recipes, preparation videos, retailer information, and product updates connected to the physical package experience.

scrollNarrative.style: sticky product stage with text chapters

chapters.headline: First, prove it is real.
chapters.body: Start with the actual carton photo so visitors see packed product, not only a render.

chapters.headline: Then elevate it.
chapters.body: Reveal the polished studio hero image to move from operational proof to consumer desire.

chapters.headline: Let the box speak.
chapters.body: Use front-panel hotspots for calories, carbohydrate, bilingual naming, dietary icons, and texture cues.

chapters.headline: Show the retail thinking.
chapters.body: Open the carton blueprint view to make the packaging look intentional, practical, and shelf-ready.

chapters.headline: Finish with the meal idea.
chapters.body: Move visitors toward recipes, retailers, and a product inquiry form.

riceGrainDrift.description: Small semi-transparent rice-grain shapes drift subtly near the product image. Keep them sparse so it feels premium, not gimmicky.

leafBreath.description: Background leaves scale by 1-2% over 8 seconds to create a quiet living-food effect.

boxTilt.description: The main product image tilts gently toward the cursor. Disable on mobile.

claimGlow.description: Nutrition callouts glow only when scrolled into view or hovered, not constantly.

trustAndRetailBlocks.title: Bilingual Canadian package
trustAndRetailBlocks.body: Front-facing English and French product naming supports Canadian retail presentation.

trustAndRetailBlocks.title: Clear nutrition callouts
trustAndRetailBlocks.body: 35 calories and 7g carbohydrate per 50g serving are visible at a glance.

trustAndRetailBlocks.title: Recognizable dietary signals
trustAndRetailBlocks.body: GMO-free, vegan, and halal cues are placed where shoppers can quickly see them.

trustAndRetailBlocks.title: Real packed inventory
trustAndRetailBlocks.body: The carton image can be used as a quiet proof point that the product exists beyond concept visuals.

recipeBridge.sectionTitle: Built for bowls, soups, stir-fries, risottos, and sauces.

cards.title: Quick stir-fry base
cards.pairing: Garlic, ginger, green onion, sesame-style sauce

seoJsonLdTemplate.name: EveGlō Instant Shirataki Rice
seoJsonLdTemplate.description: EveGlō Instant Shirataki Rice is a rice-style pantry option with 35 calories and 7g carbohydrate per 50g serving.

recommendedLibraries: CSS mask-image for the reveal wipe
performanceRules: Serve the hero image as WebP if possible, with PNG/JPG fallback.
Lazy-load backPanelMacro and flatCartonBlueprint below the fold.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion and replace parallax with fades.
Keep all text as real HTML, not baked into new images, except the packaging itself.
developerNotes.codexPrompt: Build a React/Vite website section that reads /assets/eveglo/eveglo-experience-manifest.json and renders the EveGlo Shelf-to-Plate Signature Hero. Implement the Reality-to-Retail diagonal before/after reveal, product hotspots, scroll narrative, blueprint toggle, bilingual switch, and subtle rice-grain/leaf micro-animations. Use the assetMap paths from the JSON. Make it responsive, premium, fast, and accessible. Keep the visual style clean, teal/green, natural, and retail-ready.
